title: Shattering Venezuelan Hake Fold
description: Quick-fix Venezuelan dish featuring hake, fold, and a touch of spice. Shatters in your mouth with each bite.
instructions: Cut the hake fillets into thin strips.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the hake strips and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the hake to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the lime juice to the skillet.
Scrape the bottom of the skillet to release any browned bits.
Return the hake to the skillet and toss with the lime juice and any accumulated juices.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
